# Copilot Prompt Files

> ⚠️ **These prompt files are frozen as of 2026-06 (issue #651) and retiring after 2026-08-31.**
> Do not add new `.prompt.md` files or update existing ones for new features. Build Claude-only (`commands/*.md`). See [Documents/Design/copilot-deprecation.md](../../Documents/Design/copilot-deprecation.md).
